title: The Battle of the Falkland Islands, Before and After

quoteLast: to 25 minutes past 12, and in that time 247 persons had a peep.
title: London Labour and the London Poor, Vol. 3

quoteFirst: These witnesses could recall with startling accuracy every detail that had occurred between seventeen minutes after eight and
quoteLast: on the night of September 23 over a year before; but where they had been and what they had done ten minutes earlier or ten minutes later, or where they were at nine o'clock in the evening last Friday they couldn't for the lives of them remember.
title: The Mucker
author: Burroughs, Edgar Rice, 1875-1950
